titles.text: ボックスガイ アドベンチャー

descriptions.text: A mod of Kirby's Adventure that adds new levels and lets the player play as Boxguy the Box.

From Rom Hack Plaza description

My character Boxguy the Box gets stuck in Dream land because of the mystery of a man named Top Hat Man! You got to help him get out dreamland by defeating King Dedede and by saving Dreamland, so he can take a nap to get home! (or play Somari or something.)
